'''Tamaron Rill''' was the leader of an underground [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] network in an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] controlled city. The local Imperial governor hired a [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] named [[Rill (bounty hunter)|Rill]]—known by the governor to be Tamaron's own daughter—and bring him in. She accepted the mission. Tamaron was forty-seven years old when his daughter was hired to track him down.

==Appearances==
*{{WEGCite|story=Specially Qualified|book=Galaxy Guide 10: Bounty Hunters}} {{1st}}
